short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Benjamin White, Delany Run Out!! 1 run completed. Mix-up and Ireland are bowled out for 96. This was a
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Benjamin White, Delany Run Out!! 1 run completed. Mix-up and Ireland are bowled out for 96. This was a . Full delivery outside off, White slices it past backward point and races for the first run, not sure what White was thinking as the second was on but both batters were stranded at the bowler's end, Siraj swooped in and sent the throw to Pant and he did the rest. The second would have got Delany back on strike for the next over but looks like White was not interested.

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Benjamin White, , bouncer too short and too high, White ducks under and allows it to sail over. It is
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Benjamin White, , bouncer too short and too high, White ducks under and allows it to sail over. It is called a no-ball as it is the second short ball over the head for the over

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Delany, 1 run, follows a backing away Delany and there's an inside edge onto the body, the ball rolls
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Delany, 1 run, follows a backing away Delany and there's an inside edge onto the body, the ball rolls into the off-side and the pair cross over

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Delany, , now some luck goes his way. Another short ball banged into the surface, Delany goes for the
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Delany, , now some luck goes his way. Another short ball banged into the surface, Delany goes for the pull and gets a top-edge over Pant, Axar runs back but the ball evades him as well and runs away to the fence

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Delany, , this is massive. These are handy runs for Ireland. Can Delany get them past 100? Back of the
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Delany, , this is massive. These are handy runs for Ireland. Can Delany get them past 100? Back of the length delivery and once again the ball sits up to be smashed, Delany stays leg-side and pumps the pull over deep mid-wicket

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Delany, no run, Tough chance but you expect Jadeja to take these. Short ball across off, Delany makes
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Delany, no run, Tough chance but you expect Jadeja to take these. Short ball across off, Delany makes room and looks to ramp it over short third but skies it over backward point, Jadeja runs back and keeps swirling, never gets in a good position to take the catch, the ball hits his fingertips and goes to ground

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Delany, , hit-me delivery and Delany obliges. I0$ slower short of length delivery, sits up nicely outs
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Delany, , hit-me delivery and Delany obliges. I0$ slower short of length delivery, sits up nicely outside off and Delany slaps it straight over mid-off

short_text: Bumrah to Benjamin White, no run, close to yorker length, White squeezes it off the outer half to backward point
full_text: Bumrah to Benjamin White, no run, close to yorker length, White squeezes it off the outer half to backward point

short_text: Bumrah to Delany, 1 run, full toss and Delany miscues the big shot straight down the ground, just a single
full_text: Bumrah to Delany, 1 run, full toss and Delany miscues the big shot straight down the ground, just a single

short_text: Bumrah to Delany, no run, I0$ very full delivery at the stumps, Delany digs it to long-on and denies the single
full_text: Bumrah to Delany, no run, I0$ very full delivery at the stumps, Delany digs it to long-on and denies the single

short_text: Bumrah to Benjamin White, 1 run, fullish delivery on off, White angles it off the outer half to third man
full_text: Bumrah to Benjamin White, 1 run, fullish delivery on off, White angles it off the outer half to third man

short_text: Bumrah to Joshua Little, Bowled!! Cleaned up! Why didn't Rohit go to Bumrah earlier? Nonetheless, he comes back and brea
full_text: Bumrah to Joshua Little, Bowled!! Cleaned up! Why didn't Rohit go to Bumrah earlier? Nonetheless, he comes back and breaks the highest partnership of the innings. This is a I0$ yorker aimed for the stumps, Little makes room and is beaten for pace, the ball crashes into the base of middle-stump. India are one wicket away from wrapping up the innings.

short_text: Bumrah to Joshua Little, leg byes, , this is turning into a nice little partnership. Little backs away and Bumrah follow
full_text: Bumrah to Joshua Little, leg byes, , this is turning into a nice little partnership. Little backs away and Bumrah follows him, beats the inside edge and strikes the back pad, the ball escapes past the stumps and leaves Pant wrong-footed, it also missed the helmet behind Pant by a whisker

short_text: Jadeja to Joshua Little, 1 run, shuffles inside the line and laps it past short fine, but just a single
full_text: Jadeja to Joshua Little, 1 run, shuffles inside the line and laps it past short fine, but just a single

short_text: Jadeja to Delany, 1 run, attacks the stumps and darts it in, Delany makes room and cracks it to sweeper cover
full_text: Jadeja to Delany, 1 run, attacks the stumps and darts it in, Delany makes room and cracks it to sweeper cover

short_text: Jadeja to Joshua Little, 1 run, drifts into the pads, Little nurdles it backward of square leg
full_text: Jadeja to Joshua Little, 1 run, drifts into the pads, Little nurdles it backward of square leg

short_text: Jadeja to Joshua Little, no run, shortens the length on off, Little gets right behind the line and defends
full_text: Jadeja to Joshua Little, no run, shortens the length on off, Little gets right behind the line and defends

short_text: Jadeja to Joshua Little, , he played one against Axar but this is even better. Little goes for the reverse sweep and pla
full_text: Jadeja to Joshua Little, , he played one against Axar but this is even better. Little goes for the reverse sweep and places it nicely this time, beats Axar near backward point and the ball runs away

short_text: Jadeja to Joshua Little, no run, quicker and flatter, Little stays back and knocks it to cover
full_text: Jadeja to Joshua Little, no run, quicker and flatter, Little stays back and knocks it to cover

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Joshua Little, 1 run, big over, Was Hardik tired bowling a fourth over in a row? But Ireland won't be c
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Joshua Little, 1 run, big over, Was Hardik tired bowling a fourth over in a row? But Ireland won't be complaining as they have got some much needed impetus to the innings. Back of a length delivery and it hits Little high on the bat, lobs up and lands well in front of mid-on

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Joshua Little, no run, short ball and it is well-directed, Little was backing away and ducks as he atte
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Joshua Little, no run, short ball and it is well-directed, Little was backing away and ducks as he attemtps the hook, misses and the ball flies over the top-edge

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Joshua Little, 2 runs, short of length delivery, Little splices the cross-batted shot straight of mid-o
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Joshua Little, 2 runs, short of length delivery, Little splices the cross-batted shot straight of mid-off and Rohit hunts it down, two more

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Joshua Little, , something to cheer about for the Irish supporters. Good length ball on off, Little sta
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Joshua Little, , something to cheer about for the Irish supporters. Good length ball on off, Little stays leg-side and thumps it down the ground. Struck it well as the ball raced away..

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Delany, 1 run, once more does not bother to get in-line and swipes it to deep mid-wicket
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Delany, 1 run, once more does not bother to get in-line and swipes it to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Delany, , in the air and over the fielder. Short of length and angled in, Delany clears his front leg a
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Delany, , in the air and over the fielder. Short of length and angled in, Delany clears his front leg and heaves it to deep square leg. There was a fielder and he was interested but the ball cleared him comfortably

short_text: Axar to Joshua Little, no run, flighted around off, Little plays a late cut but straight to short third
full_text: Axar to Joshua Little, no run, flighted around off, Little plays a late cut but straight to short third

short_text: Axar to Delany, 1 run, flatter and fraction short, Delany cracks it to deep backward point
full_text: Axar to Delany, 1 run, flatter and fraction short, Delany cracks it to deep backward point

short_text: Axar to Delany, no run, slower and outside off, Delany sits down and swipes across the line, the ball keeps low and goes
full_text: Axar to Delany, no run, slower and outside off, Delany sits down and swipes across the line, the ball keeps low and goes past the under-edge, Pant takes off the bails but Delany had not left the crease

short_text: Axar to Joshua Little, 1 run, that's brave. Little plays a reverse sweep first ball and hits it through the point region
full_text: Axar to Joshua Little, 1 run, that's brave. Little plays a reverse sweep first ball and hits it through the point region

short_text: Axar to McCarthy, Caught&Bowled!! There goes another. Axar does not take long to strike. He takes a brilliant catch to s
full_text: Axar to McCarthy, Caught&Bowled!! There goes another. Axar does not take long to strike. He takes a brilliant catch to send McCarthy back for a duck. Pushed through and McCarthy closes the bat face looking to work it into the leg-side, gets a leading edge and Axar moves to his right, slides in front of Delany and takes it with both hands. Replays show that it was not a leading edge and McCarthy chipped back off the face of the bat.

short_text: Axar to Delany, 1 run, drifting into the pads, Delany nudges it backward of square leg
full_text: Axar to Delany, 1 run, drifting into the pads, Delany nudges it backward of square leg

short_text: Hardik Pandya to McCarthy, no run, Was that the slower ball? It surely didn't come on. McCarthy charges down and swings
full_text: Hardik Pandya to McCarthy, no run, Was that the slower ball? It surely didn't come on. McCarthy charges down and swings off his feet, but the ball arrived later and just bounced over the stumps

short_text: Hardik Pandya to McCarthy, no run, now the bouncer and McCarthy takes it on, but the ball climbs over his swinging blade
full_text: Hardik Pandya to McCarthy, no run, now the bouncer and McCarthy takes it on, but the ball climbs over his swinging blade and beats the top-edge

short_text: Hardik Pandya to McCarthy, no run, I0$ fraction short and McCarthy goes for the pull, but the ball does not bounce and s
full_text: Hardik Pandya to McCarthy, no run, I0$ fraction short and McCarthy goes for the pull, but the ball does not bounce and strikes him on the thigh

short_text: Hardik Pandya to McCarthy, no run, I0$ fullish delivery around off, McCarthy pushes it to mid-off
full_text: Hardik Pandya to McCarthy, no run, I0$ fullish delivery around off, McCarthy pushes it to mid-off

short_text: Hardik Pandya to McCarthy, no run, back of a length delivery on off, McCarthy manages to defend it to the off-side
full_text: Hardik Pandya to McCarthy, no run, back of a length delivery on off, McCarthy manages to defend it to the off-side

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Mark Adair, Caught by Shivam Dube!! They are falling like nine pins now. Third wicket for Hardik. Adair
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Mark Adair, Caught by Shivam Dube!! They are falling like nine pins now. Third wicket for Hardik. Adair's idea to play shots does not work for long. Short and wide delivery, he backs away and toe-ends the upper cut to sweeper, Dube runs in and takes a simple catch. In fact, He picked up Campher off his last ball and Adair off his first ball.

short_text: Siraj to Delany, no run, length ball, defended from the crease
full_text: Siraj to Delany, no run, length ball, defended from the crease

short_text: Siraj to Mark Adair, 3 runs, full at the stumps, Adair doesn't hold back and looks to slog, dragging it off the inside h
full_text: Siraj to Mark Adair, 3 runs, full at the stumps, Adair doesn't hold back and looks to slog, dragging it off the inside half past mid-on. Bumrah chases it down

short_text: Siraj to Dockrell, Caught by Bumrah!! Dockrell looks to take on the bouncer but skies it off a thick top-edge. Simple ca
full_text: Siraj to Dockrell, Caught by Bumrah!! Dockrell looks to take on the bouncer but skies it off a thick top-edge. Simple catch for Bumrah at mid-on and he's not going to drop that. Dockrell was backing away premeditatedly and Siraj banged it in short, getting the ball to climb on him.

short_text: Siraj to Dockrell, no run, length ball just outside off, Dockrell flat-bats it to mid-off and . Delany has gone charging
full_text: Siraj to Dockrell, no run, length ball just outside off, Dockrell flat-bats it to mid-off and . Delany has gone charging across for the single while Dockrell isn't interested. Rohit has a shy at the stumps but misses. Kohli was running across to get at the stumps, and he tells Rohit that he should've thrown it to him

short_text: Siraj to Dockrell, 2 runs, Pitched up on off, Dockrell gets forward and punches it in the air. Rohit is quite wide at mi
full_text: Siraj to Dockrell, 2 runs, Pitched up on off, Dockrell gets forward and punches it in the air. Rohit is quite wide at mid-off, has to charge across to his right and then put in the dive. He gets fingertips to it but can't hang on

short_text: Siraj to Dockrell, no run, 138kph length ball slanted in on leg, Dockrell defends from the crease
full_text: Siraj to Dockrell, no run, 138kph length ball slanted in on leg, Dockrell defends from the crease

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Campher, Caught by Pant!! Nicked and gone! Length ball in the channel just outside off, Campher looks t
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Campher, Caught by Pant!! Nicked and gone! Length ball in the channel just outside off, Campher looks to defend but it nibbles away a touch to take a faint edge. Carries comfortably to Pangt and Hardik has his second.

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Campher, no run, fuller than a length just outside off, stops on Campher as he looks to drive and he's
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Campher, no run, fuller than a length just outside off, stops on Campher as he looks to drive and he's unable to keep it down. Kohli dives across at short cover but it falls short of him

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Campher, no run, good length on middle, defended forward
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Campher, no run, good length on middle, defended forward

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Dockrell, 1 run, full on the pads, flicked behind square
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Dockrell, 1 run, full on the pads, flicked behind square

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Campher, 1 run, fuller than a length just outside off, Campher looks to drive and it flies off a thick
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Campher, 1 run, fuller than a length just outside off, Campher looks to drive and it flies off a thick edge to deep third

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Campher, , full ball in the slot for Campher and he launches it straight back for six. First of the gam
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Campher, , full ball in the slot for Campher and he launches it straight back for six. First of the game. It was floated up by Hardik and Campher went through the line

short_text: Bumrah to Tector, Caught by Kohli!! Nasty bouncer, smashes Tector on the glove, then smashes the helmet and balloons up
full_text: Bumrah to Tector, Caught by Kohli!! Nasty bouncer, smashes Tector on the glove, then smashes the helmet and balloons up in the air. It's a dolly for Kohli to cover, and Ireland continue to collapse on this minefield. It was dug in short, Tector tried to take it on with the pull but it got big on him while also rushing him for pace.

short_text: Bumrah to Tector, 2 runs, good length on off, Tector looks to drive but it nips back in and takes a thick inside edge be
full_text: Bumrah to Tector, 2 runs, good length on off, Tector looks to drive but it nips back in and takes a thick inside edge behind square

short_text: Bumrah to Tector, no run, banged in short outside off, Tector looks to pull but is beaten
full_text: Bumrah to Tector, no run, banged in short outside off, Tector looks to pull but is beaten

short_text: Bumrah to Campher, 1 run, dances down and punches this length ball firmly to sweeper cover
full_text: Bumrah to Campher, 1 run, dances down and punches this length ball firmly to sweeper cover

short_text: Bumrah to Campher, no run, pushed to point
full_text: Bumrah to Campher, no run, pushed to point

short_text: Bumrah to Tector, 1 run, good length ball on off, Tector knocks it in front of mid-on
full_text: Bumrah to Tector, 1 run, good length ball on off, Tector knocks it in front of mid-on

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Campher, , full delivery on the pads, Campher flicks it behind square and gets off the mark with a boun
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Campher, , full delivery on the pads, Campher flicks it behind square and gets off the mark with a boundary

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Tucker, Bowled!! Middle stump is pegged back and Ireland lose their third! This is a cracking delivery.
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Tucker, Bowled!! Middle stump is pegged back and Ireland lose their third! This is a cracking delivery. Fuller than a length just outside off, Tucker looks to drive but it jags in sharply, goes through the gate and crashes into middle. Hardik isn't too excited though. No real celebration from him. Tucker didn't move his feet much there. Was rooted to the crease.

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Tector, leg byes, 1 run, length ball on off, kicks up, nips back in and strikes Tector on the back thig
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Tector, leg byes, 1 run, length ball on off, kicks up, nips back in and strikes Tector on the back thigh. They scamper across for a single

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Tector, no run, blocked from the crease to point
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Tector, no run, blocked from the crease to point

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Tucker, 1 run, mix-up between the two batters as Jadeja makes a diving stop at backward point. Back of
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Tucker, 1 run, mix-up between the two batters as Jadeja makes a diving stop at backward point. Back of a length just outside off, Tucker steers it to the left of Jadeja and is caught ball-watching slightly. He's late to take off but manages to charge across and make it safely as the throw comes in

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Tucker, no run, full ball on off, 133.6kph, Tucker doesn't really move his feet much as he pushes to co
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Tucker, no run, full ball on off, 133.6kph, Tucker doesn't really move his feet much as he pushes to cover

short_text: Bumrah to Tector, no run, now the ball nips back sharply and strikes him on the thigh
full_text: Bumrah to Tector, no run, now the ball nips back sharply and strikes him on the thigh

short_text: Bumrah to Tector, no run, Fuller than a length on off, Tector has to play at it, he looks to defend but it's unplayable
full_text: Bumrah to Tector, no run, Fuller than a length on off, Tector has to play at it, he looks to defend but it's unplayable

short_text: Bumrah to Tector, no run, fuller than a length on off at 140.9kph, Tector gets forward and defends
full_text: Bumrah to Tector, no run, fuller than a length on off at 140.9kph, Tector gets forward and defends

short_text: Bumrah to Tector, no run, back of a length outside off, Tector looks to cut and mistimes it to point
full_text: Bumrah to Tector, no run, back of a length outside off, Tector looks to cut and mistimes it to point

short_text: Bumrah to Tector, no run, fuller than a length outside off, driven to cover-point
full_text: Bumrah to Tector, no run, fuller than a length outside off, driven to cover-point

short_text: Bumrah to Tector, no run, Bumrah is on target first ball as you would expect. Fuller than a length, angled in on off, Te
full_text: Bumrah to Tector, no run, Bumrah is on target first ball as you would expect. Fuller than a length, angled in on off, Tector gets forward to defend but it nips in, goes past the inside edge and bounces over the stumps

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tucker, , good length outside off, plenty of width and Tucker slaps it through the covers. Was in the
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tucker, , good length outside off, plenty of width and Tucker slaps it through the covers. Was in the air but in the gap

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tucker, no run, and then he produces a beauty like this one! Length ball across off, it climbs sharply
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tucker, no run, and then he produces a beauty like this one! Length ball across off, it climbs sharply off the pitch and whistles past the bat shoulder in defence

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tucker, , very wide outside off, Tucker looks to drive but can't reach it. Radar has been off in this
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tucker, , very wide outside off, Tucker looks to drive but can't reach it. Radar has been off in this over for Arshdeep

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tector, 1 run, fuller than a length on off and middle, swinging back in, Tector pushes at it and gets
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tector, 1 run, fuller than a length on off and middle, swinging back in, Tector pushes at it and gets a thick inside edge behind square

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tector, , full ball swinging down leg, Tector looks to flick it away but is beaten
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tector, , full ball swinging down leg, Tector looks to flick it away but is beaten

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tector, no run, because of the variable bounce and he swings his hand in pain! Length ball, kicks up s
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tector, no run, because of the variable bounce and he swings his hand in pain! Length ball, kicks up sharply and smashes him as he looks to defend

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tector, , very wide outside off, Tector looks to drive but it keeps low and
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tector, , very wide outside off, Tector looks to drive but it keeps low and

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tector, no run, fuller than a length across off, left alone
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tector, no run, fuller than a length across off, left alone

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tector, , bonus runs for Ireland as Arshdeep loses control of this inswinger and strays a long way dow
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tector, , bonus runs for Ireland as Arshdeep loses control of this inswinger and strays a long way down leg. No chance for Pant and it runs away to the boundary

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tector, no run, oh this is a devilish pitch. Length ball on off, and smashes Tector on the glove as he
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tector, no run, oh this is a devilish pitch. Length ball on off, and smashes Tector on the glove as he looks to defend

short_text: Siraj to Tucker, no run, 139.6kph full ball slanted in, Tucker looks to drive but is beaten on the inside edge. It smash
full_text: Siraj to Tucker, no run, 139.6kph full ball slanted in, Tucker looks to drive but is beaten on the inside edge. It smashes him low on the pad but there's no appeal as it's comfortably missing leg stump

short_text: Siraj to Tucker, no run, good length outside off, climbs sharply off the surface and Tucker is beaten as he looks to dri
full_text: Siraj to Tucker, no run, good length outside off, climbs sharply off the surface and Tucker is beaten as he looks to drive on the up. Nips away as well

short_text: Siraj to Tucker, , Tucker walks across the stumps, gets a length ball on off, and scoops it over the keeper! Good execut
full_text: Siraj to Tucker, , Tucker walks across the stumps, gets a length ball on off, and scoops it over the keeper! Good execution of the premeditated shot

short_text: Siraj to Tucker, no run, now this one jags back in off the seam! Back of a length on off, comes back a long way and stri
full_text: Siraj to Tucker, no run, now this one jags back in off the seam! Back of a length on off, comes back a long way and strikes Tucker on the thigh. It's incredibly difficult for the batters out there

short_text: Siraj to Tucker, no run, oh that's an absolute peach! 138.7kph, length ball angled in on off, Tucker gets forward to def
full_text: Siraj to Tucker, no run, oh that's an absolute peach! 138.7kph, length ball angled in on off, Tucker gets forward to defend but it

short_text: Siraj to Tucker, no run, fuller than a length just outside off, draws Tucker forward in defence and nips away past the o
full_text: Siraj to Tucker, no run, fuller than a length just outside off, draws Tucker forward in defence and nips away past the outside edge

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Balbirnie, Bowled!! Castled! Did that keep a bit low? Length ball across middle, Balbirnie stays leg-s
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Balbirnie, Bowled!! Castled! Did that keep a bit low? Length ball across middle, Balbirnie stays leg-side of it and looks to steer it to deep third. Maybe stays a touch low, not too much, but Balbirnie is beaten by the angle. It goes past the edge and clatters into off stump. Two in the over for Arshdeep!

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Balbirnie, no run, back of a length on leg stump, shapes back in and cramps Balbirnie for room as he l
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Balbirnie, no run, back of a length on leg stump, shapes back in and cramps Balbirnie for room as he looks to punch it through the off-side. He gets an inside edge onto the body

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Balbirnie, , dug in short as Balbirnie gives the charge. He still looks to take it on, goes for the pu
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Balbirnie, , dug in short as Balbirnie gives the charge. He still looks to take it on, goes for the pull but is beaten. Square leg umpire signals wide for height

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Balbirnie, no run, beauty! Length ball across off stump, Balbirnie looks to defend from the crease but
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Balbirnie, no run, beauty! Length ball across off stump, Balbirnie looks to defend from the crease but it leaves him with the angle and

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tucker, 1 run, length ball across off, bit of width on offer and Tucker back-cuts to deep third
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tucker, 1 run, length ball across off, bit of width on offer and Tucker back-cuts to deep third

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tucker, no run, full ball across off, Tucker looks to drive but is beaten by the angle. Goes past the
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Tucker, no run, full ball across off, Tucker looks to drive but is beaten by the angle. Goes past the outside edge to the keeper

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Stirling, Caught by Pant!! There's that spongy bounce again, and Arshdeep draws first blood! Length ba
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Stirling, Caught by Pant!! There's that spongy bounce again, and Arshdeep draws first blood! Length ball on leg stump, Stirling looks to slog across the line but it kicks up on him and takes a thick top-edge. Goes high in the air and it's an easy catch for Pant. Stirling was aggressive in his approach right from the first ball, and has perished in that same manner.

short_text: Siraj to Balbirnie, no run, back of a length on off, Balbirnie defends from the crease to point
full_text: Siraj to Balbirnie, no run, back of a length on off, Balbirnie defends from the crease to point

short_text: Siraj to Balbirnie, , short of length delivery down the leg-side, Balbirnie is late on the pull and gloves it past the k
full_text: Siraj to Balbirnie, , short of length delivery down the leg-side, Balbirnie is late on the pull and gloves it past the keeper. Runs away fine for four

short_text: Siraj to Balbirnie, no run, oh dear! , taking both batter and keeper by surprise. Line is outside off, Balbirnie looks t
full_text: Siraj to Balbirnie, no run, oh dear! , taking both batter and keeper by surprise. Line is outside off, Balbirnie looks to pull but is comprehensively beaten as the ball takes off sharply from the surface. Pant leaps one-handed and cuts it off

short_text: Siraj to Balbirnie, no run, beaten again! Fuller than a length just outside off, Balbirnie advances and looks to go over
full_text: Siraj to Balbirnie, no run, beaten again! Fuller than a length just outside off, Balbirnie advances and looks to go over the off-side ring but it

short_text: Siraj to Balbirnie, no run, good shape again for Siraj. 133kph length ball outside off, Balbirnie looks to punch off the
full_text: Siraj to Balbirnie, no run, good shape again for Siraj. 133kph length ball outside off, Balbirnie looks to punch off the back foot but it curves away past the outside edge

short_text: Siraj to Balbirnie, no run, full delivery around middle and off at 138kph, there's a hint of outswing and Balbirnie is r
full_text: Siraj to Balbirnie, no run, full delivery around middle and off at 138kph, there's a hint of outswing and Balbirnie is rooted to the crease in defence

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Stirling, no run, banged in short at 139.6kph as Stirling advances again. He decides to sway out of th
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Stirling, no run, banged in short at 139.6kph as Stirling advances again. He decides to sway out of the way and lets it go to the keeper

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Stirling, no run, gives the charge again but gets an inswinger that cramps him for room on leg stump.
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Stirling, no run, gives the charge again but gets an inswinger that cramps him for room on leg stump. Has to adjust as he taps it to cover

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Stirling, no run, length ball across off, Stirling expects an inswinger but it goes on with the angle,
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Stirling, no run, length ball across off, Stirling expects an inswinger but it goes on with the angle, beating the outside edge comprehensively

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Stirling, no run, fuller than a length across off, Stirling gets forward and knocks it into the off-si
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Stirling, no run, fuller than a length across off, Stirling gets forward and knocks it into the off-side

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Stirling, 2 runs, Stirling gives the charge straightaway! Length ball across off, he advances down and
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Stirling, 2 runs, Stirling gives the charge straightaway! Length ball across off, he advances down and punches firmly through the covers. On most outfields it was four, but this one is quite sluggish. It holds up inside the ropes and the fielder chases it down. Poor running from the batters as they only pick up two

short_text: Arshdeep Singh to Balbirnie, 1 run, gentle inswinger on the pads, 132kph, and Balbirnie is off the mark as he flicks to
full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Balbirnie, 1 run, gentle inswinger on the pads, 132kph, and Balbirnie is off the mark as he flicks to deep backward square

short_text: McCarthy to Pant, , that's some way to finish off a game! Typical Pant! Length ball outside off, he goes reverse and sco
full_text: McCarthy to Pant, , that's some way to finish off a game! Typical Pant! Length ball outside off, he goes reverse and scoops it straight behind the keeper for six. He's had enough of this pitch and will be relieved to get out of there. India open their campaign with an eight-wicket win

short_text: McCarthy to Pant, no run, oh dear! Pant is in the wars out there, Back of a length, rears up off the deck and smashes hi
full_text: McCarthy to Pant, no run, oh dear! Pant is in the wars out there, Back of a length, rears up off the deck and smashes him on the arm again

short_text: Benjamin White to Shivam Dube, no run, flat on off, back of a length, Dube cuts to backward point
full_text: Benjamin White to Shivam Dube, no run, flat on off, back of a length, Dube cuts to backward point

short_text: Benjamin White to Shivam Dube, no run, tossed up on leg, Dube works it to short midwicket
full_text: Benjamin White to Shivam Dube, no run, tossed up on leg, Dube works it to short midwicket

short_text: Benjamin White to Suryakumar Yadav, Caught by Dockrell!! Surya goes for the maximum looking to finish the contest, but h
full_text: Benjamin White to Suryakumar Yadav, Caught by Dockrell!! Surya goes for the maximum looking to finish the contest, but he holes out in the deep. Tossed up on off, goes for a big slog-sweep but miscues it high in the air off the top-edge. Dockrell runs across at deep midwicket and hangs onto it.

short_text: Benjamin White to Pant, 1 run, tossed up on leg, Pant dances down and drives to long-off
full_text: Benjamin White to Pant, 1 run, tossed up on leg, Pant dances down and drives to long-off

short_text: Benjamin White to Pant, , tossed up outside off, googly from White, Pant reaches out and slaps it over extra cover
full_text: Benjamin White to Pant, , tossed up outside off, googly from White, Pant reaches out and slaps it over extra cover

short_text: Benjamin White to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, flat on middle and leg, back of a length, Surya tucks it behind square
full_text: Benjamin White to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, flat on middle and leg, back of a length, Surya tucks it behind square

short_text: Joshua Little to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, back of a length across off, dabbed to deep third
full_text: Joshua Little to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, back of a length across off, dabbed to deep third

short_text: Joshua Little to Suryakumar Yadav, no run, fuller than a length outside off, Surya goes for his trademark pick-up shot b
full_text: Joshua Little to Suryakumar Yadav, no run, fuller than a length outside off, Surya goes for his trademark pick-up shot but is beaten by the steep bounce

short_text: Joshua Little to Pant, 1 run, back of a length on middle, jags in and strikes Pant on the thigh. He runs across to the o
full_text: Joshua Little to Pant, 1 run, back of a length on middle, jags in and strikes Pant on the thigh. He runs across to the other end and is still reeling from the blow on the elbow as he swings his arm in pain

short_text: Joshua Little to Pant, , back of a length on off, Pant pulls hard and sends it sailing over the midwicket boundary. Got
full_text: Joshua Little to Pant, , back of a length on off, Pant pulls hard and sends it sailing over the midwicket boundary. Got it right off the middle

short_text: Joshua Little to Pant, no run, So many balls just spitting off a length on this pitch. Dangerous stuff. Good length deli
full_text: Joshua Little to Pant, no run, So many balls just spitting off a length on this pitch. Dangerous stuff. Good length delivery, jags in and kicks up as Pant looks to defend. Smashes him on the glove perhaps

short_text: Joshua Little to Pant, , full ball down the leg-side, Pant swings and misses
full_text: Joshua Little to Pant, , full ball down the leg-side, Pant swings and misses

short_text: Joshua Little to Pant, no run, Length ball on off, he swipes across the line but the ball kicks up and smashes him on th
full_text: Joshua Little to Pant, no run, Length ball on off, he swipes across the line but the ball kicks up and smashes him on the left elbow. That must've hurt. He is okay to continue though

short_text: Mark Adair to Rohit, 2 runs, short of length delivery and Rohit takes it on, gets the pull high on the bat and the ball
full_text: Mark Adair to Rohit, 2 runs, short of length delivery and Rohit takes it on, gets the pull high on the bat and the ball lands safely near deep mid-wicket

short_text: Mark Adair to Rohit, , Not his fluent knock but the conditions haven't been easy. Just a raise of the bat to celebrate t
full_text: Mark Adair to Rohit, , Not his fluent knock but the conditions haven't been easy. Just a raise of the bat to celebrate the milestone. Floaty full toss and Rohit swipes it to the vacant deep mid-wicket region

short_text: Mark Adair to Rohit, 2 runs, very full delivery at the stumps, Rohit shuffles and clips it to deep mid-wicket, easy brac
full_text: Mark Adair to Rohit, 2 runs, very full delivery at the stumps, Rohit shuffles and clips it to deep mid-wicket, easy brace

full_text: Mark Adair to Rohit, 2 runs, I0$ full delivery around off, Rohit miscues the loft and clears mid-off, couple more

full_text: Mark Adair to Pant, 1 run, I0$ fullish delivery around off, Pant mistimes the loft towards long-on

full_text: Mark Adair to Pant, no run, short ball on off, Pant thought about the ramp but aborted from the shot

full_text: Mark Adair to Pant, , I0$ slower ball sprayed down leg, Pant has no chance of connecting that

full_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, no run, short of length around off, Rohit rides the bounce and drops it with soft hands to the off-side

short_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, no run, backs away and looks to go big again, but the ball does enough to beat the inside edge
full_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, no run, backs away and looks to go big again, but the ball does enough to beat the inside edge

short_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, , back to back sixes. This was a poor delivery - short of length and the line was around leg-stu
full_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, , back to back sixes. This was a poor delivery - short of length and the line was around leg-stump, Rohit swivels and helps it along the way over fine leg

short_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, , Rohit connects with his pull shot. Short of length delivery and he takes it on, gets into a go
full_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, , Rohit connects with his pull shot. Short of length delivery and he takes it on, gets into a good position and nails it over deep square leg

short_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, no run, Back of a length delivery, Rohit shuffles across and looks to help it or scoop it to fin
full_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, no run, Back of a length delivery, Rohit shuffles across and looks to help it or scoop it to fine leg, but the ball bounces more and strikes him near the shoulder before lobbing to point

short_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, no run, back of a length on off, Rohit pats it with soft hands in front of point
full_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, no run, back of a length on off, Rohit pats it with soft hands in front of point

full_text: McCarthy to Pant, no run, on a length outside off, Pant goes hard on the flat-batted hit and mistimes it to mid-off

short_text: McCarthy to Pant, , not off the middle but effective. Back of a length delivery and Pant gets the cross-batted shot high
full_text: McCarthy to Pant, , not off the middle but effective. Back of a length delivery and Pant gets the cross-batted shot high on the bat, he hits it straight and the ball has enough to reach the fence

short_text: McCarthy to Pant, 2 runs, I0$ back of a length delivery, Pant wanted to play the pick-up shot over fine leg but gets a t
full_text: McCarthy to Pant, 2 runs, I0$ back of a length delivery, Pant wanted to play the pick-up shot over fine leg but gets a top-edge and the ball flies over Tucker, lands safely and the pair scamper back for the second

short_text: McCarthy to Rohit, 1 run, short of length on middle and leg, Rohit gets inside the line and swivel-pulls it to fine leg
full_text: McCarthy to Rohit, 1 run, short of length on middle and leg, Rohit gets inside the line and swivel-pulls it to fine leg

full_text: McCarthy to Pant, 1 run, short of length delivery at the body, Pant is cramped for space and mistimes the pull through mid-wicket

full_text: McCarthy to Rohit, 1 run, leg-lined delivery, Rohit hops and tucks it to square leg

full_text: Campher to Pant, 2 runs, I0$ short and outside off, Pant cuts it behind square and Little tidies up from third man, jjust a brace

full_text: Campher to Pant, no run, I0$ back of a length around off, Pant aims to steer it to third man and is beaten on the outside edge

full_text: Campher to Rohit, 1 run, short of length delivery, Rohit helps the pull along the ground to fine leg

short_text: Campher to Rohit, no run, now charges down to play the big shot but the ball holds its line, beats the swinging blade an
full_text: Campher to Rohit, no run, now charges down to play the big shot but the ball holds its line, beats the swinging blade and flies over leg-stump

short_text: Campher to Rohit, no run, uhhh! This one rears up from a good length spot, Rohit was hanging back in the crease and is b
full_text: Campher to Rohit, no run, uhhh! This one rears up from a good length spot, Rohit was hanging back in the crease and is beaten on the outside edge. Not much he could have done there as the ball climbed viciously

full_text: Campher to Pant, 1 run, I0$ full pitcher on off, Pant whips it down to long-on

full_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, no run, short of length delivery, Rohit looks to punch off the back foot but the extra bounce once again deceives the batters, beaten

short_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, , shot! Overpitched outside off, Rohit bends down and opens the bat face, uses the pace of Littl
full_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, , shot! Overpitched outside off, Rohit bends down and opens the bat face, uses the pace of Little and slices it over the backward point region. No one in the deep to stop that

full_text: Joshua Little to Pant, 1 run, I0$ angled into the pads, Pant flicks to deep square leg

full_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, 1 run, fullish delivery around off, Rohit is through the shot early and gets a thick inside edge wide of mid-wicket

full_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, no run, slanted outside off, Rohit ignores

full_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, no run, full and angled outside off, Rohit looks to loft down the ground and is beaten on the outside edge

full_text: Mark Adair to Pant, no run, short of length delivery outside off, Pant throws his bat on the big shot and is beaten by the extra bounce

full_text: Mark Adair to Pant, , slower ball slipped down leg, Pant tries to help it along the way but doesn't connect

full_text: Mark Adair to Pant, no run, full delivery around off, Pant goes hard on the drive and drags it off the inner half to mid-on

full_text: Mark Adair to Rohit, 1 run, I0$ full delivery and Rohit looks to drive, gets a thick outside edge to third man

full_text: McCarthy to Pant, no run, back of a length delivery across off, Pant clears his front leg and swings through the line, beaten on the outside edge

short_text: McCarthy to Rohit, 1 run, Short of length delivery and Rohit is rushed on the pull, miscues it to mid-on and sets off on
full_text: McCarthy to Rohit, 1 run, Short of length delivery and Rohit is rushed on the pull, miscues it to mid-on and sets off on a risky single, Adair gets a good bounce but fails to hit the stumps at the bowler's end

full_text: McCarthy to Rohit, no run, short of length delivery with some extra bounce, Rohit plays it well with soft hands and dabs it to short third

full_text: Mark Adair to Pant, , that ruins the over. Poor delivery - overpitched and Pant has no half measures, he's sees the ball in the slot and smashes it straight back down the ground

full_text: Mark Adair to Pant, no run, I0$ yorker close to off, Pant digs it back to Adair

short_text: Mark Adair to Kohli, Caught by Benjamin White!! Adair has his wicket. Kohli goes cheaply. He gives the charge and got th
full_text: Mark Adair to Kohli, Caught by Benjamin White!! Adair has his wicket. Kohli goes cheaply. He gives the charge and got the short of length delivery outside off, but the spongy bounce did him there as the ball bounced more and flew off the top-edge to third man, White barely had to move to take the catch.

short_text: Mark Adair to Kohli, no run, jaffa! Back of a length and angled in, keeps coming in and Kohli prods forward to defend, h
full_text: Mark Adair to Kohli, no run, jaffa! Back of a length and angled in, keeps coming in and Kohli prods forward to defend, he's beaten by the movement as the ball goes past the inside edge and flies over the stumps

short_text: Mark Adair to Kohli, no run, I0$ full pitcher around off, Kohli pushes it to mid-off
full_text: Mark Adair to Kohli, no run, I0$ full pitcher around off, Kohli pushes it to mid-off

short_text: Mark Adair to Kohli, no run, charges down first ball to Adair and is nowhere close to the back of a length delivery, swi
full_text: Mark Adair to Kohli, no run, charges down first ball to Adair and is nowhere close to the back of a length delivery, swings away outside off and Kohli misses it by a mile

short_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, , poor delivery to end the over. Little looks for the yorker once again but ends up gifting a fu
full_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, , poor delivery to end the over. Little looks for the yorker once again but ends up gifting a full toss, free swing for Rohit and he pumps it over long-on, just clearing the rope

short_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, , streaky! Nails the yorker outside off, Rohit bends down to squeeze it out and the inside edge
full_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, , streaky! Nails the yorker outside off, Rohit bends down to squeeze it out and the inside edge runs away fine

short_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, , Little is struggling with his line. Sprays another inswinger down leg, no chance for Rohit thi
full_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, , Little is struggling with his line. Sprays another inswinger down leg, no chance for Rohit this time

full_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, no run, I0$ yorker right at the stumps, Rohit jams it to the off-side

full_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, no run, missed out there. Another leg-lined delivery and Rohit does not connect with the glance, the ball deflects off the pad to Tucker

full_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, 2 runs, half volley on the pads, Rohit flicks it over the leg-side ring and picks up a brace

full_text: Joshua Little to Rohit, , looks for the inswinger but starts outside leg-stump, swings further down and Rohit misses the glance

full_text: Joshua Little to Kohli, 1 run, I0$ fullish delivery around off, Kohli pushes it off the outer half to third man

short_text: Mark Adair to Rohit, , Tough chance but you need to take those when defending a low total. Rohit sees the width and thro
full_text: Mark Adair to Rohit, , Tough chance but you need to take those when defending a low total. Rohit sees the width and throws his bat, the outside edge flies to second slip and Balbirnie is beaten for pace, he tries to take it over his head but the ball bursts through his hands

full_text: Mark Adair to Rohit, no run, good length ball in the channel, Rohit has a tentative prod and squirts an inside edge to short fine

full_text: Mark Adair to Rohit, 2 runs, full and too straight, Rohit gently nudges it through the mid-wicket region and gets off the mark with a brace

full_text: Mark Adair to Rohit, no run, uhhh! Rohit charges down to counter the swing but the length is shortened and Adair gets it to nip in, Rohit is beaten on the inside edge and Tucker dives to his left to make the stop

full_text: Mark Adair to Rohit, no run, I0$ fullish delivery on off, Rohit defends it back with a straight bat
